name: relay
description: Operations and control layer for AI coding agents: persistent cross-tool memory, multi-model dispatch (Codex, LM Studio, OpenRouter, Anthropic), audit trail, and steerable agentic execution. Local SQLite store.
author: Ghanavati

scripts.build: tsc && npm run --silent build:fixtures && (chmod +x dist/cli.js 2>/dev/null || true)
scripts.build:fixtures: mkdir -p dist/memory/__fixtures__ dist/tools/figma/__fixtures__ && (cp -p src/memory/__fixtures__/*.db dist/memory/__fixtures__/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp -p src/tools/figma/__fixtures__/*.json dist/tools/figma/__fixtures__/ 2>/dev/null || true)
scripts.test: env -u RELAY_MEMORY_ALLOWED_WORKDIRS -u RELAY_ALLOWED_ROOTS bash -c 'node --test --test-concurrency=1 $(find dist -type f -name "*.test.js")'
